about.title: About
about.bio: Passionate Full Stack Developer, I build modern web applications with React, Next.js and Java Spring Boot. My international journey has taken me from Dakar to Rennes, with remote experience for a Brazilian company and several freelance engagements. Currently on a mission at Niji, finishing my Full Stack MBA at MyDigitalSchool and available for a full-time position from September 2026.
about.experienceSubtitle: Each project has strengthened my technical expertise and my ability to deliver high-value solutions.
about.niji_desc: At Niji, I work on high-impact projects in entertainment and B2B e-commerce, focusing on frontend integration, user interfaces, APIs and delivery quality.
about.clarins_title: Full Stack Developer - Freelance mission for Clarins
about.clarins_desc: I had the opportunity to work as a freelancer for Clarins, where I contributed to optimising their digital platform by writing Framer code overrides.
about.mds_desc: In training, I am honing my skills in full stack development, building performant and innovative applications. I work on real-world projects, delivering robust solutions tailored to client needs.
about.dysoft_desc: As a Full Stack Developer at Dysoft Consulting for over a year, I had the opportunity to build innovative and engaging digital experiences. My role involved contributing to multi-vendor e-commerce applications and Progressive Web Apps, integrating payment solutions while ensuring optimised user journeys.
about.monark_desc: During my six-month internship at Monark Group, I played a key role assisting in the development of WordPress sites, including showcase sites, e-commerce and intranets. I contributed to building dynamic landing pages with interactive animations to enhance the user experience.
about.ism_title: Bachelor's in Software Engineering & Networks - ISM Digital Campus
about.ism_desc: This programme gave me a solid foundation in web and mobile development, project management and networking, paving the way for a versatile technical expertise oriented towards innovative solutions.
